__FORCETOC__

= Assistant Lab Box =
{{RewardIconWithText|Assistant Lab Box|blue}} randomly obtain 30 Organ Slime (up to {{Retext|blue|blue}}) and have a drop rate of:
* 70% {{RewardIconWithLink|Green Organ Slime|green}}
* 30% {{RewardIconWithLink|Blue Organ Slime|blue}}


= Advanced Lab Box =
{{RewardIconWithText|Advanced Lab Box|purple}} randomly obtain 30 Organ Slime (up to {{Retext|purple|purple}}) and have a drop rate of:
* 53.33% {{RewardIconWithLink|Green Organ Slime|green}}
* 30% {{RewardIconWithLink|Blue Organ Slime|blue}}
* 16.67% {{RewardIconWithLink|Purple Organ Slime|purple}}

= Special Lab Box =
{{RewardIconWithText|Special Lab Box|orange}} randomly obtain 30 Organ Slime (up to {{Retext|orange|orange}}) and have a drop rate of:
* 48.33% {{RewardIconWithLink|Green Organ Slime|green}}
* 30% {{RewardIconWithLink|Blue Organ Slime|blue}}
* 15% {{RewardIconWithLink|Purple Organ Slime|purple}}
* 6.67% {{RewardIconWithLink|Orange Organ Slime|orange}}

[[Category:Reward Pack]]
